commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=e488b53cff3d7a6a3bbaa53f5d507f9dee3c8f8f)
commands.review_summary:
The branch adds optional Feishu `sendIntervalMs` config, delays reply/comment text chunk loops, and adds shared assistant-visible-text stripping for `commentary to=functions.*` lines.

PR surface: Source +17, Tests +45. Total +62 across 5 files.

Reproducibility: yes. source-level: current main and v2026.6.8 have Feishu chunked/comment/outbound send paths and reactive retry handling but no proactive pre-send interval configuration. I did not run a live Feishu burst test in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] Human review and contributor action are needed because the blockers are public config semantics, cross-send-surface coverage, unrelated branch scope, and contributor real behavior proof.

target.title: feat(feishu): add sendIntervalMs config for outbound message rate limiting (fixes #14206)
target.author: liuhao1024

commands.reason: repair commands require a ClawSweeper PR or a PR opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
